assumptions: The developer has Git and a terminal.
No Upsun account, organization, or project exists yet.
Despite Start from zero labeling, a local project that already runs may still be required by Setup.

developer_goal: Create an Upsun account and deploy a first application to a live production environment URL.

first_success.outcome: Upsun has built and deployed the application to the default production environment and exposed its primary URL.
first_success.observable_signal: Deployment succeeds, the production environment is Active, and the primary environment URL opens or is returned by the CLI.

route_selection.surface: Upsun CLI plus Console project creation
route_selection.rule: Get Started presents Start from zero, Bring your project, and Connect your repo as peer paths; signup fields and the expected local app remain unresolved.

candidates.name: Start from zero via CLI
candidates.reason: Vendor default narrative, but Setup still requires working local code and does not pick one framework.

candidates.name: Bring your existing project
candidates.reason: Peer path that may skip greenfield app creation but still needs config, resources, and push.

candidates.name: Connect GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket
candidates.reason: Adds external repo linking and preview automation beyond the minimal first live production deploy.

required_path.action: Register for an Upsun trial account using email or GitHub, Bitbucket, or Google.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and verification fields
required_fields.notes: Docs name providers and link signup but do not expose the atomic registration screens.

required_path.observable_result: The developer can authenticate with the Upsun CLI or Console.

required_path.action: Install the Upsun CLI and run upsun login.
required_path.observable_result: The CLI is authenticated to the Upsun account.

required_path.action: Create the first organization if prompted, then create a project and initialize Upsun configuration for the local application.
required_path.observable_result: A project exists with committed Upsun configuration for the application.

required_path.action: Set resources if required, commit configuration, and run upsun push.

required_fields.label: Resource settings
required_fields.notes: Get Started shows upsun resources:set; whether it is mandatory on every trial is unresolved.

required_path.observable_result: Upsun accepts the push and starts build and deploy.

required_path.action: Open or retrieve the environment primary URL after production becomes Active.
required_path.observable_result: The primary URL serves the deployed application.

prerequisites.description: Git installed locally and basic command-line familiarity.
A supported runtime and a local project that already runs, despite Start from zero framing.

external_gates.description: Account signup with email or third-party identity must succeed before CLI login completes.
Creating the first organization activates the time-limited trial.

unavoidable_waits.description: Upsun must validate configuration, build images, allocate resources, and deploy before the primary URL is live.

platform_outcomes.description: upsun push triggers build and deploy to the default production environment.
A successful deploy marks the environment Active and exposes a primary URL.

excluded.reason: Documentation is evidence for unresolved route choice.

excluded.item: Connecting GitHub for automatic PR previews

uncertainties.question: What local application does Start from zero expect when the developer has no project yet?
uncertainties.impact: Framework choice and local setup can add a large undocumented segment before Upsun commands.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one official starter stack and verification that Setup and Get Started agree on required local artifacts.

uncertainties.question: What is the current account signup, verification, and first-organization field order?
uncertainties.impact: Pre-CLI account counts cannot be verified from public documentation.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Fresh-account Console signup walkthrough with dated screenshots.

uncertainties.question: Is explicit upsun resources:set mandatory on the current trial before first push?
uncertainties.impact: Adds or removes a required CLI configuration action.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Current trial walkthrough confirming whether defaults allow push without resources:set.
